title: Place (channels of distribution)
summary: 9609 AS — distribution channels, intermediaries, and e-commerce.
learningObjectives: Define place in the marketing mix.
Explain roles of wholesalers and retailers.

simpleExplanation.title: Getting product to buyer
simpleExplanation.summary: Place decisions cover how goods move from producer to consumer — directly or through intermediaries.

sections.content: **Place** (3.3.6) completes **AS 4Ps detail**. Draw **channel diagrams** showing **flow of goods and payments**.
